name: ghduty
description: GitHub duty — automated agent whose core job is to automate your pending tasks. From durable GitHub state (assigned + mentioned + review-requested, open, all repos) it handles each item by subtype in parallel: assigned issue with a linked PR → signed acknowledgment comment; assigned idea-issue with no PR → ticket + pushed branch in the repo's clone + Slack to /drive; assigned PR → skip (closed, or open-in-progress during testing); mention → reply (skip if the mentioning comment is >2yr old); review request → /code-review. Idempotent by reply signature / existing ticket. Built to run on a schedule.
